strengths: old/bald/headwear cue recovery on several heldout samples
failures: exact pose and crop are not reliable
speech bubble and panel layout are not preserved
distinctive props such as fan/hand details are unstable
non-human silhouette can regress even when metric improves

heldout_notes.heldout00: blend is slightly closer than prev on silhouette, but pale face direction, fan, and side/back composition are not preserved
heldout_notes.heldout01: angry male cue is transferred, but age, beard density, and speech bubble are weak
heldout_notes.heldout02: bald old monk cue improves over no_ip and blend is slightly stronger than prev, but crop/style are still off
heldout_notes.heldout03: red seated woman cue transfers; blend is cleaner, but hand pose and bubble/page details are not preserved
heldout_notes.heldout04: black-haired side-face cue transfers; blend has cleaner costume, but speech bubbles and exact crop fail
heldout_notes.heldout05: official hat/shouting cue transfers; blend is cleaner, but profile composition and speech bubble fail
heldout_notes.heldout06: official headwear/mustache cue transfers; blend is stronger than prev but expression/crop still drift
heldout_notes.heldout07: structural fail: reference green demon side head becomes full-body dark demon/assassin under prev/blend

next_step: Use c058 as evidence that runtime blend is current best but insufficient; proceed to distillation or failure-focused continuation rather than more simple runtime weight sweeps.
